parameters.jsCode:
const stats = $input.first().json;
const hour = new Date().getUTCHours();
const dayOfYear = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(new Date().getFullYear(), 0, 0)) / 86400000);
const slotMap = {6:0,7:1,9:2,10:3,12:4,13:5,15:6,16:7,18:8,19:9,21:10,22:11};
const slot = slotMap[hour] !== undefined ? slotMap[hour] : 0;

const pool = pools[slot];
const idx = dayOfYear % pool.length;
let tweet = pool[idx];

// Replace dynamic placeholders with live API data
Object.entries(stats).forEach(([key, val]) => {
  tweet = tweet.replace(new RegExp('\{\{' + key + '\}\}', 'g'), val);
});

if (tweet.length > 280) tweet = tweet.substring(0, 277) + '...';
return [{ json: { tweet, slot, dayOfYear, idx, charCount: tweet.length, stats } }];
